message:
chore: ignore runtime .frankensearch/ index and vector data

Add **/.frankensearch/ to .gitignore — these are Tantivy lexical index
segments and vector store data generated at runtime by the
frankensearch-fsfs crate, not source artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,3 +84,6 @@ test_logs/
 
 # Claude Code IDE config
 .claude/
+
+# Runtime index/vector data (generated by frankensearch-fsfs)
+**/.frankensearch/
